subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Confirmed the patch is correct and safe to apply, with no concerns or objections.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a device-private branch in mm/migrate_device.c, addressing an issue where the function was being called on non-present PMDs and potentially causing bogus folio pointers or pfn_to_page validation errors. The change mirrors a similar fix for change_non_present_huge_pmd().
